user_query: I'm organizing a company event for my colleagues. Can you suggest some programming memes from Reddit to include in the event presentation? Additionally, find some popular posts from Reddit about team building activities for inspiration.

TaskList.description: Search for popular programming memes on Reddit to include in the presentation.
Fetch the content of the programming memes found in step 1.
Search for popular posts about team building activities on Reddit for inspiration.
Collect and summarize the content of the team building posts retrieved in step 3.
